fixtureActions.content:
# Soft12 Async2 Tool700 Contract

## Soft 12
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.12 with quality bias floor 0.10 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 2
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.02 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 700
tool result budgets default to 700 chars with 12-char previews; Grep head defaults to 50 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/usage/footer vitest
